name: IGET One
description: The IGET One offers 12,000 puffs of smooth, flavourful vapour. A premium disposable vape available in a wide selection of fruity and icy flavours.

flavours.name: Blueberry Raspberry
flavours.description: The IGET One Blueberry Raspberry is a perfect blend of tangy blueberry and raspberry sweetness.

flavours.name: Tropical Orange Monster
flavours.description: The IGET One Tropical Orange Monster is a zesty fusion of fresh and juicy oranges with the bold, electrifying kick of energy drink for a refreshing and invigorating vape.

flavours.name: Strawberry Pomegranate Ice
flavours.description: The IGET One Strawberry Pomegranate Ice is a unique mix of strawberries and fresh pomegranates for that tropical hit.

flavours.name: Strawberry
flavours.description: The IGET One Strawberry is a sun-ripened, succulent strawberry flavour that balances natural sweetness with a light, refreshing tang for a classic fruit experience.

flavours.name: Blueberry Ice
flavours.description: The IGET One Blueberry Ice is a perfect blend of tangy blueberry sweetness with an icy, refreshing menthol finish.

flavours.name: Mixed Berries Ice
flavours.description: The IGET BOne Mixed Berries Ice features a tasty berry mix with deliciously sweet strawberries, raspberries, and blueberries with a hint of an ice cool menthol.

flavours.name: Cherry Monster
flavours.description: The IGET One Cherry Monster combines the succulent and tangy taste of cherries with the bold, electrifying kick of energy drink for a refreshing and invigorating vape.

flavours.name: Raspberry Grape Ice
flavours.description: The IGET One Raspberry Grape Ice features a delicious raspberry and grape mix with a hint of ice cool menthol that will leave you wanting more.

flavours.name: Chupa Chups Blackberry
flavours.description: The IGET One Black Forest offers a deep, syrupy blackberry profile that mirrors the iconic Chup@ Chups candy sweetness with a rich and tangy berry exhale.

flavours.name: Chupa Chups Cherry
flavours.description: The IGET One Chup@ Chups Cherry is a nostalgic and candy-sweet blend that captures the authentic flavour of a cherry lollipop with a smooth, sugary finish.

flavours.name: Blackberry Ice
flavours.description: The IGET One Blackberry Ice is a perfect blend of delicious blackberries with an icy, refreshing menthol finish.

flavours.name: Strawberry Kiwi Ice
flavours.description: The IGET One Strawberry Kiwi Ice offers a delightful combination of ripe strawberries and tangy kiwis, perfectly balanced with a cool and icy sensation, resulting in a refreshing and satisfying vaping experience. With each inhale, you'll experience the sweet and juicy flavours of strawberries and kiwis, enhanced by a chilly exhale that leaves a refreshing tingle on your palate.

flavours.name: Strawberry Watermelon Ice
flavours.description: The IGET One Strawberry Watermelon Ice combines the luscious sweetness of ripe strawberries with the refreshing juiciness of watermelon, all enhanced by a cool and invigorating icy finish, resulting in a deliciously refreshing and satisfying vaping experience. With each inhale, you'll enjoy the harmonious blend of fruity flavours, highlighted

flavours.name: Grape Ice
flavours.description: The IGET One Grape Ice combines the luscious taste of ripe grapes with a refreshing icy twist, offering a delightful balance of fruity sweetness and cooling sensation in every puff. Experience the invigorating fusion of grape flavours and a frosty finish, providing a satisfying and cool vaping experience.

flavours.name: Cherry Pomegranate
flavours.description: The IGET One Cherry Pomegranate combines the succulent and tangy taste of cherries with the rich and slightly tart essence of pomegranates, resulting in a harmonious blend of fruity flavours that excite the palate. With every inhale, you'll enjoy the vibrant combination of cherry and pomegranate, creating a deliciously satisfying vaping experience.

flavours.name: Blackberry Cherry Pomegranate
flavours.description: The IGET One Blackberry Cherry Pomegranate contains a unique blend of sweet cherry and pomegranates with a delicious blackberry twist.

flavours.name: Strawberry Raspberry
flavours.description: The IGET One Strawberry Raspberry is a perfect blend of sweet, ripe strawberries and tangy raspberries, delivering a mouthwatering, berry-filled vape experience.

flavours.name: Chupa Chups Grape
flavours.description: The IGET One Chup@ Chups Grape captures the nostalgic sweetness of classic grape candy, offering a rich, fruity flavour perfectly balanced with a smooth finish. This delightful blend is perfect for those who enjoy a sweet and fruity vaping experience that transports you back to your childhood.

flavours.name: Chupa Chups Strawberry
flavours.description: The IGET One Chup@ Chups Strawberry captures the nostalgic sweetness of classic strawberry candy, offering a rich, fruity flavour perfectly balanced with a smooth finish. This delightful blend is perfect for those who enjoy a sweet and fruity vaping experience that transports you back to your childhood.

flavours.name: Kiwi Pineapple
flavours.description: The IGET One Kiwi Pineapple offers a symphony of berry goodness, seamlessly combining the succulent sweetness of ripe raspberries, blackberries, and an assortment of other berries, creating a vibrant and complex profile that delivers a fruity explosion with every satisfying puff.

flavours.name: Black Forest
flavours.description: The IGET One Black Forest offers a symphony of berry goodness, seamlessly combining the succulent sweetness of ripe raspberries, blackberries, and an assortment of other berries, creating a vibrant and complex profile that delivers a fruity explosion with every satisfying puff.

flavours.name: Mountain Spring Mint Ice
flavours.description: The IGET One Mountain Spring Mint Ice offers an intense burst of icy menthol with a crisp, refreshing minty flavour, providing a smooth and invigorating vape that’s cool and revitalising with every puff.

flavours.name: Blue Monster
flavours.description: The IGET One Blue Monster is a perfect blend of tangy blueberry sweetness and the bold, electrifying kick of energy drink for a refreshing and invigorating vape.

reviews.name: Megan P.
reviews.title: Really good
reviews.text: Very nice flavour, smooth draw. Would rate 5 but it took a few puffs to really get going.
